name: bondexos
description: BondexOS MVP enterprise para automatizacion de fianzas con IA.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @bondexos/shared && npm run build -w @bondexos/integrations && npm run build -w @bondexos/api && npm run build -w @bondexos/workers && npm run build -w @bondexos/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @bondexos/shared && npm run build -w @bondexos/integrations && npm run typecheck -w @bondexos/api && npm run typecheck -w @bondexos/workers && npm run typecheck -w @bondexos/web
